steps.t: Rowing boats can be found on the shore at Hashadîr, south of Dol Amroth. You should compromise the rowing boats' ability to float.
Rowing boats can be found on the shore at Hashadîr, south of Dol Amroth. You should compromise the rowing boats' ability to float.
